name: Smokey's Rescue Team
developer: Else If Games Pty Ltd, Tecshield
short_description: Calling all cat lovers! Smokey's Rescue Team lets you foster abandoned felines, ensuring their well-being until they find loving forever homes. Shower them with love, manage their needs, and witness the joy of adoption.
detailed_description: Dive into the heart of a cat adoption shelter, ready to welcome abandoned felines into your care. It's your job to keep the cats happy and healthy, managing their health and needs to prevent chaos. Watch out, though—a neglected cat will make sure you know it by turning your carefully placed furniture into their playground of destruction. Over time, potential adopters will visit your shelter, requesting special traits in their new cat. Adopters will leave donations to help you continue your noble cause based on how much they love the cat you offer. This game offers a unique blend of simulation and wholesome casual gameplay, perfect for anyone passionate about cat welfare and management. Join the adventure and make a difference in the lives of these adorable creatures!
